nasb.text: You shall put pure frankincense on each row that it may be a memorial portion for the bread, even an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: And you shall put pure frankincense on each pile, that it may go with the bread as a memorial portion as a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 把純乳香放在每排餅上，象徵這些餅作獻給耶和華的火祭。

ccb.text: 每行饼上放一些纯乳香，象征这些饼是献给耶和华的火祭。
